query: Count all buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Kristiansand municipality

2.description: retrieve 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) for later spatial reduction

3.description: get buildings in the municipality (filter by kommunenummer) with geometry

4.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced 200-year storm-surge polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per building (group by bygningid)

6.description: count distinct buildings intersecting storm-surge areas

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204')) ;
